title: cassinopsis ilicifolia
intro: Cassinopsis ilicifolia, also known as New Caledonian holly, is a plant species that belongs to the family Cunoniaceae. It is native to New Caledonia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Cassinopsis ilicifolia has been found to have potential health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. The plant can be prepared as an infusion or decoction for medicinal use, and it is also used in herbal preparations, including tinctures and teas.
